title: Manual Rotary Cheese Grater with 3 Interchangeable Stainless Steel Drums, Hand-Cranked Food Grater for Cheese, Vegetables, Chocolate, Nuts – Easy Clean & Safe Kitchen Tool
features: 🧀HAND-CRANKED CHEESE GRATER, SAFER AND MORE CONVENIENT: The hand-cranked cheese grater can not only cut various ingredients perfectly, but also protect you from sharp blades! One turn of the handle means 12 cuts, fast and efficient while keeping away from the dreaded blade. No need to worry about hand injuries, giving you more peace of mind and peace of mind when working in the kitchen. Whether you're cutting cheese, vegetables or other ingredients, you can do it with ease!

🥒MULTIFUNCTIONAL GRATER, SUITABLE FOR A VARIETY OF INGREDIENTS: The grater is equipped with 3 replaceable grater barrels to meet your cutting needs for different ingredients! The blade-shaped grater barrel can easily cut cucumbers and other ingredients, the small-hole grater barrel can finely grate cheese, and the large-hole grater barrel can help you make delicious French fries!

🧄DETACHABLE DESIGN FOR EASY CLEANING AND MAINTENANCE: Graters for kitchen feature three detachable parts, making cleaning a breeze! Simply rinse with warm water and mild detergent to thoroughly clean the grater and prepare it for your next cooking session. You can also choose to put it in the dishwasher, saving time and effort!

🥕FOOD-GRADE MATERIAL, DURABLE AND SAFE: The rotary cheese grater is made of high-quality ABS plastic and stainless steel, guaranteed to be durable and meet food safety standards! The ABS plastic is strong and durable, not easily deformed, and the stainless steel blade is sharp and durable, which can easily meet the cutting needs of various food ingredients. Non-toxic and odorless material allows you to use it with confidence and protect the health of your family.

🥔MULTIPURPOSE CUTTING TOOL: The multipurpose vegetable cutter can easily cut grated cheese, carrots, vegetables, parmesan cheese, nutmeg, ginger, garlic, chocolate, coconut and other ingredients, becoming a multifunctional tool in your kitchen! Whether you are doing daily cooking or making desserts, it can help you process ingredients quickly, save time and energy, and allow you to enjoy delicious food easily!
